'''Ezam Nhor''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] who served his people as their liaison to the [[New Jedi Order]]. In [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] he joined [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in their scouting mission to the planet [[Borao]], which later became the new Ithorian homeworld.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
